# orchestrator_mcp

MCP server for the orchestrator → cheap-worker pattern. See README.md for
architecture; docs/deepseek-behavior.md for how to drive the worker model.

## Playbook (verified 2026-06-11)
<!-- generated by /repo-playbook; every ✓ command was actually run -->

| Action | Command | Verified |
|---|---|---|
| test | `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q --timeout=60` | ✓ 179 passed, <1s |
| server smoke | `.venv/bin/python -c "import asyncio,server; print(len(asyncio.run(server.mcp.list_tools())))"` | ✓ 27 tools |
| install | `python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt` | documented, not executed (venv exists) |
| run as MCP | registered in ~/.claude.json as `orchestrator` (stdio) | ✓ live |

### Quirks
- Tests are network-free; live-model checks need the env from ~/.claude.json's
  `orchestrator` entry (OPENROUTER_API_KEY + DELEGATE_BASE_URL=opencode zen).
- Required env keys (see .env.example, never commit values):
  OPENROUTER_API_KEY; optional: DELEGATE_BASE_URL, DELEGATE_API_KEY,
  ASK_MODEL_DEFAULT, TAVILY_API_KEY.
- Default worker model: deepseek-v4-flash-free (user wants deepseek for ALL
  workers — no model routing).
- `.delegate/` is runtime state (gitignored). `delegate_run`/`delegate.py`/
  `DELEGATE_*` names are intentional (mode names, not stale branding).
- After committing here, resync the Desktop copy:
  `rsync -a --exclude .venv --exclude __pycache__ --exclude .pytest_cache --exclude .delegate ~/orchestrator_mcp/ ~/Desktop/personal-projects/orchestrator_mcp/`
- CI workflow exists but unpushed (gh token needs `workflow` scope).
